case_title: SHAKER I. DAHUD VS. WAYNE HARTMAN

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED DENYING QUASH MTN & THAT DF MUST RESPOND W/IN 5 DAYS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAHUD, SHAKER I.

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT WAYNE HARTMAN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IS DENIED, 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAHUD, SHAKER I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARTMAN, WAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 201 LEAVEWORTH STREET, #410, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-2008, SEE SCANNED DOC

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT HARTMAN, WAYNE HEARING SET FOR MAR-17-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
